## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hyperexponential and GrowthX to discuss content pipeline, review processes, and upcoming content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Notion-based review process implemented with stages: Planning, SME Review, Marketing Review, Approve to Publish](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Content pipeline management shifting to Notion for better visibility and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Focus on creating more targeted, industry-specific content (e.g., AI ROI in commercial insurance, verticalized coding assistants)](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Upcoming content to leverage internal resources like CEO's podcast and exec insights panels](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Topics

### New Notion-based Review Process

  - [Implemented new Notion-based review process with stages: Planning, SME Review, Marketing Review, Approve to Publish](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Added date tracking for each stage to monitor review timelines](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [David to initially handle final approval, transitioning to Franki later](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Team to tag relevant SMEs directly in Notion for reviews](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Content Pipeline Management

  - [Shifting from Airtable to Notion for better visibility and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Bailey to update Airtable with links to Notion docs for comprehensive tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Weekly recap automation proposed to track content progress and bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

### Upcoming Content Strategy

  - [Focus on more targeted, industry-specific content (e.g., "How to measure AI ROI in commercial insurance")](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Exploring verticalized content ideas, such as coding assistants for actuaries](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Leveraging internal resources like CEO's podcast and exec insights panels for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Aiming for 2-3 week content planning cycles](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### Image and Brand Assets

  - [Franki to follow up on scheduling time with art director for new brand images](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Using existing Storyblock brand images as a temporary solution](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Content Depth and Structure

  - [Discussion on balancing assumed knowledge vs. detailed explanations in articles](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Suggestion to break down complex topics into separate, linked articles for deeper dives](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Emphasis on citing reputable sources (e.g., BCG, McKinsey) for industry benchmarks and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bailey to update Notion setup and move current content for review](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Franki to add 7-10 existing articles to Notion for Aida to refresh](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [Bailey to create a more comprehensive content calendar in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Franki to share video clips from exec insights panels on AI](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Team to explore examples of verticalized coding assistants across industries](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for Friday (Halloween), early in the day](https://fathom.video/share/6pZ4Gw2sHHyaKPWzfPshVFodPxcQs3x8?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
